title: Nicky van Heerden’s murder accused named
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Breaking News\n Update","html":"Breaking News\n Update"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The 53-year-old man accused of the murder of former Plettenberg Bay detective Anneke “Nicky” van Heerden has been named as Bevan van Druten.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS - The 53-year-old man accused of the murder of former Plettenberg Bay detective Anneke “Nicky” van Heerden has been named as Bevan van Druten."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Van Druten is well known as a driftwood artist from Wilderness, now living in Plett. It is believed that Van Druten and Van Heerden was in a romantic relationship."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is charged with murder and appeared briefly in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, Wednesday 21st of January before Magistrate Zukiswa Hans.","html":"He is charged with murder and appeared briefly in the Plettenberg Bay Magistrate’s Court today, Wednesday 21st of January before Magistrate Zukiswa Hans."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"NPA spokesperson Eric Ntabazalila said the case has been postponed to Monday 26 January for his legal representative “to come on board, for a full bail profile and a possible bail application”.","html":"NPA spokesperson Eric Ntabazalila said the case has been postponed to Monday 26 January for his legal representative “to come on board, for a full bail profile and a possible bail application”."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The State will oppose his bail application, said Ntabazalila.","html":"The State will oppose his bail application, said Ntabazalila."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"ObservationNtabazalila said Van Druten is being referred to the district surgeon for observation in the meantime.","html":"Observation
Ntabazalila said Van Druten is being referred to the district surgeon for observation in the meantime."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Van Heerden’s body was found at Rivertides, Keurbooms Beach, near the Keurbooms Lagoon at about 22:30 on Sunday night, 18 January, said Western Cape police spokesperson Sergeant Wesley Twigg in an earlier statement."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Twigg said a murder case was registered at Plettenberg Bay police after Van Heerden’s body was found.","html":"Twigg said a murder case was registered at Plettenberg Bay police after Van Heerden’s body was found."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He said police members who responded to a complaint of a woman who was screaming found her body next to a vehicle, and medical personnel declared her dead at the scene.","html":"He said police members who responded to a complaint of a woman who was screaming found her body next to a vehicle, and medical personnel declared her dead at the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Read previous articles:","html":"Read previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Former Plett detective found murdered along Keurbooms Beach in Plett"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Nicky van Heerden’s murder accused named
